description_long: This jewelry set features a beaded necklace and matching earrings, both displayed on a matte black stand. The necklace is composed of alternating pink and red spherical beads, with a larger, textured red bead as the central focal point. The earrings are dangle-style, each with a cluster of small red and pink beads, echoing the necklace's color scheme. The beads appear to be made of glass or polished resin, giving them a subtle shine. The necklace is strung on a thin, likely metallic or nylon thread, while the earrings are suspended from gold-toned hooks. The overall design is vibrant and playful, with a handcrafted, artisanal feel.
description: A beaded necklace and matching dangle earrings in pink and red hues, featuring a prominent central bead and clustered bead earrings, displayed on a black stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with its central red bead and both earrings clearly visible, highlighting the symmetrical arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizing the necklace's profile and the way the beads drape, with one earring partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the necklace as it wraps around the stand, with no earrings visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's side profile and the other earring in partial view.
